title: Month-end Close in Practice
shortSummary: Build stronger month-end close in practice judgment so accounting work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Month-end Close in Practice is a leverage point inside accounting. It supports the broader goal of p&l, balance sheet, tax basics, and bookkeeping hygiene.
coreConcepts: Month-end Close in Practice needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good month-end close in practice work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Month-end Close in Practice should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
